page.title: Samples
page.subtitle: Every green sample out the door and where the buyer's verdict stands on each one.

empty.title: No open samples
empty.description: Log a sample to a buyer and it stays here until they send a verdict back.

card.unlockNote: Approving this pre-shipment sample unlocks the contract sign for {lot}.

log.title: Log a sample
log.gramsHint: A pre-shipment draw pulls these grams from the lot's available kilos.

verdict.title: Record the buyer's verdict
verdict.body: What did {buyer} say about the {kind} sample of {lot}?
verdict.unlockNote: An approved pre-shipment sample is what lets a reserve contract be signed.

errors.lotRequired: Pick a green lot to sample.
errors.gramsPositive: Grams must be greater than zero.
errors.sampleRequired: Pick a sample to record a verdict on.
errors.scoreRange: A buyer score must be between 0 and 100.
